text:
Leatherman Raptor Rescue
The Amazon listing describes the Raptor Rescue as emergency or trauma shears made from stainless steel. It says the rescue features include a carbide glass breaker, a strap cutter, and a ring cutter. The shears lock when holstered so they can be carried upside-down on a belt for quick access. The listing gives a closed length of 5 inches, a weight of 5.8 ounces or 164 grams, and a shear length of 1.9 inches.
title: Leatherman Raptor Rescue
